title: UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 170 Posts
short_info: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has officially released a recruitment notification for Fireman. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 10-04-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 09-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 29-06-2026 Correction Last Date: 06-07-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of normalized score of Preliminary Eligibility Test (PET-2025). Main Written Examination (Objective Type
120 minutes). Physical Measurement Test (qualifying nature) for shortlisted candidates. Document Verification.
how_to_apply: Apply only through official website upsssc.gov.in using PET-2025 Registration Number and OTP.
Fill personal details, educational qualifications, select posts and preferences.
important_instructions: Only candidates who appeared in PET-2025 and possess a valid score card are eligible to apply. Applicants must possess all required qualifications and certificates by the last date of application (29/06/2026). Reservation benefits as per latest UP Government orders for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Divyang/Women/Ex-Servicemen etc. One application only per candidate. Multiple applications will be rejected. Application can be modified only till 06/07/2026. UPSSSC decision on eligibility and selection is final.
